dimensions.name: Information type in securities settlement, clearing, trading context

codes.ADV: Average Daily Notional Value of trades cleared
codes.AVT: Average daily volume of trades cleared (Total)
codes.BDE: Number of business days on which estimated largest payment obligation exceeded qualifying liquid resources
codes.C01: Non-debt ISIN codes o/w no price is available

codes.IM3: Prefunded default resources and initial margin
codes.IOA: Share of initial margin provided for interoperability arrangements in total initial margin
codes.LP1: Estimated largest payment obligation in total that would be caused by the default of any single participant and its affiliates in extreme but plausible market conditions
codes.LP2: Amount by which estimated largest payment obligation exceeded qualifying liquid resources
codes.LSD: Listed securities (listed companies in case of equity) - domestic
codes.LSN: Listed securities (listed companies in case of equity) - non-domestic
codes.LST: Listed securities (listed companies in case of equity)

codes.ODF: Ratio of own capital alongside and after to default fund

codes.PR3: Percentage of Total Initial Margin in prefunded default resources and initial margin
codes.QL2: Ratio of qualifying liquid resources to prefunded default resources and initial margin
codes.QL3: Ratio of qualifying liquid resources to the estimated largest same-day payment obligation

codes.SDF: Ratio of skin-in-the-game to default fund

codes.ST2: Securities transfers from clearing member to clearing member
codes.TC1: Total cash received from participants, initial margin
